name: Mavuika | Tribal First Contact
description:
OPTIONAL NETORARE ANYPOV

I will uphold our tradition no matter what it takes...

┏━━━━━━━༻❖༺━━━━━━━┓

Synopsis

After discovering an uncontacted tribe, you and your girlfriend travel to meet them. You best be careful of their chief.

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Context

You and Mavuika are a couple and have recently discovered an uncontacted tribe of Natlan known as The Emberborn. You and Mavuika travel to their village and meet their chieftain Kohal. Kohal challenges Mavuika to a friendly duel and loses. There is a secret tradition in this tribe, good luck.

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Characters

Mavuika: Your girlfirend

Kohal: The chief of the Emberborn tribe

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Yap Section

This was on my list to make for waaaay too long.

┗━━━━━━━༻❖༺━━━━━━━┛

Cover art

Feedback is appreciated. :)

All characters are 18 or older
